content.text: Great! It's in `bin\Release\`. Now let me copy all 5 exe files to the target directory:

input.command:
TargetDir="/c/Users/Administrator/Desktop/DSC CHINA NX4/exe"

echo "=== Copying executables to target directory ==="
echo ""

# Copy JA01-JA04 from bin folder
for proj in "JA01" "JA02" "JA03" "JA04"; do
  src="/c/Users/Administrator/Desktop/DSC CHINA NX4/NX4C FRT/NX4C FRT/$proj/bin/NX4C_FRT_${proj}(20260313).exe"
  dst="$TargetDir/NX4C_FRT_${proj}(20260313).exe"
  if [ -f "$src" ]; then
    cp "$src" "$dst"
    echo "SUCCESS: Copied NX4C_FRT_${proj}(20260313).exe"
    ls -lh "$dst"
  else
    echo "ERROR: Source not found: $src"
  fi
  echo ""
done

# Copy SERVER SEARCH from bin/Release folder
src="/c/Users/Administrator/Desktop/DSC CHINA NX4/NX4C FRT/NX4C FRT/SERVER SEARCH/bin/Release/NX4C_FRT_SERVER_SEARCH(20260313).exe"
dst="$TargetDir/NX4C_FRT_SERVER_SEARCH(20260313).exe"
if [ -f "$src" ]; then
  cp "$src" "$dst"
  echo "SUCCESS: Copied NX4C_FRT_SERVER_SEARCH(20260313).exe"
  ls -lh "$dst"
else
  echo "ERROR: Source not found: $src"
fi
echo ""

echo "=== Final verification in target directory ==="
ls -lh "$TargetDir"/NX4C_FRT_*.exe 2>&1 | tail -10
